title: Operations methods: job, batch, flow, mass customisation
summary: 9609 AS — production methods from one-offs to mass customisation.
learningObjectives: Describe job, batch, and flow production.
Match methods to product and demand.

simpleExplanation.title: How production is organised
simpleExplanation.summary: Job production suits unique orders; batch groups similar items; flow is continuous mass production; mass customisation combines scale with personalisation.
steps: Flow: assembly line, low unit cost.

sections.content: **Operations methods** (4.1.4) is core **Topic 4**. Place the **case firm** on the job→flow spectrum with reasons.
